footer.description: The heart of student life at FAPPZ. We connect students across disciplines, organize events, and keep traditions alive.
footer.newsletterText: Subscribe to our newsletter and never miss an event.
footer.address:
CULS Prague, FAPPZ
Kamýcká 129
165 00 Prague - Suchdol

homePage.heroSub: Connecting students, science, and fun at our faculty.
homePage.feat1Text: A place where you'll meet classmates from all majors and years.
homePage.feat2Text: From orientation weeks and barbecues to professional lectures.
homePage.feat3Text: We honor the traditions of the faculty and proudly wear our colors.
homePage.aboutP1: Pupen isn't just an association. It's a community open to everyone on campus.
homePage.aboutP2: We know that studying isn't just about textbooks. It's about people and experiences you'll be talking about for years.
homePage.whatTitle: What will you experience with us?
homePage.whatSub: Our calendar is packed all year round. There's something for everyone – whether you're a party animal or a fan of professional lectures and excursions.
homePage.what1Desc: Orientation events, parties, and legendary barbecues.
homePage.what2Desc: Workshops, guest speakers from the field, or excursions.
homePage.what3Desc: Older members will advise you on your studies, credits, or dorm life.
homePage.faqQ1: Do I have to be a FAPPZ student to join?
homePage.faqA1: We are primarily an association for FAPPZ students, but our events are often open to the entire CZU. If you want to become a core member and help organize, studying at FAPPZ is a big advantage, but not a requirement.
homePage.faqA2: Currently, the membership fee is set at 200 CZK per academic year. The membership fee is collected to fund activities and expenses related to the association's events.
homePage.faqA3: The best way is to come to one of our events and talk to us! Or write to us via the contact form/application on the website.
homePage.faqA4: We have a club room right at FAPPZ in room A341. Most often, however, you'll find us in the field – at the Circular Hall (Kruhová hala) or in the pubs in Suchdol.
homePage.ctaTitle: Don't wait for graduation. Start living right now.
homePage.ctaSub: Join us and make the most of your time in Suchdol. You'll meet people you might never have met in a lecture hall.
homePage.ctaJoinSub: Got ideas to improve faculty life? Want to help organize events? Join us!

aboutPage.heroDescription: We are a group of students who believe that university isn't just about exams, but mainly about people, experiences, and lifelong friendships.
aboutPage.value1Desc: We create a safe space where no one feels alone. We help freshmen get involved and older students pass on their experience.
aboutPage.value3Desc: We do this in our free time and for free. Why? Because we love the atmosphere and the smiles of the people at our events.
aboutPage.teamSubtitle: The people who pull the strings and lose sleep so that events turn out great.
aboutPage.descVice: The creative soul. Responsible for social media and the visual side of events.
aboutPage.storyP1: Back then, a group of students decided that Suchdol needed more life. It wasn't about big plans, but about the desire to meet up.
aboutPage.storyP2: The first event was a small barbecue for a few friends. Today? Today we organize events for students and staff, we have our own facilities, and we are a proud part of the university.
aboutPage.storyP3: Even though members change, the spirit of Pupen remains the same. We are open to anyone who wants to lend a hand or just have fun.

paymentSettings.subtitle: Manage association bank account and payment automation

paymentSettings.pairingMailDesc: Payments are manually confirmed by the administrator based on email notifications from the bank.
paymentSettings.pairingFioDesc: The system automatically connects to Fio bank and pairs payments based on the variable symbol.
paymentSettings.pairingVsDesc: Payments are automatically paired based on the variable symbol (VS) which corresponds to the ticket order number.
paymentSettings.configApiTokenPlaceholder: Your API token from Fio Internet Banking
paymentSettings.configApiTokenHelp: You can find the token in the Fio bank settings under the API section. We recommend using a read-only token.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy (GDPR)
privacyPage.intro: We value your trust. By using our services, you grant consent to the Pupen Student Association, z.s. to process your personal data in accordance with the following principles.
privacyPage.controllerText: The controller is Studentský spolek Pupen, z.s., ID No.: 22694498, registered at the Municipal Court in Prague, file No. L 18291, with its registered office at Kamýcká 129, Suchdol, 165 00 Prague (hereinafter referred to as the "Controller").
privacyPage.controllerContactPrefix: For privacy inquiries, contact us at:
privacyPage.scopeIntro: We process data you provide through membership or communication:
scopeList: Year of joining and role in the association
Photos and videos from association events
Year and field of study at CZU
Financial data for association accounting purposes
Other data necessary for the association's operations
privacyPage.purposeText: We process data for member records, informing about association activities, fulfilling the association's purpose (scholarships, events), and promotion (marketing).
privacyPage.retentionText: We keep data for the duration of membership and for a maximum of 3 years after its termination.
privacyPage.recipientsTitle: 4. Who do we share data with?
recipientsList: Czech University of Life Sciences Prague (e.g., for scholarship payments)
Technology partners (Supabase for database, Vercel for hosting)
Google LLC (only if you use Google sign-in)
privacyPage.oauthText: If you choose Google sign-in, we share the necessary technical data with the provider (Google) to verify your identity and receive an account identifier and basic profile information according to your account settings. We use this data only for sign-in and account security.
privacyPage.marketingText: You agree to the processing of your name, photos, and videos for marketing purposes on the website and social networks. This consent can be withdrawn at any time by email to
privacyPage.rightsIntro: Under the GDPR, you have the right to:
rightsList: Access your data and information about its processing
Correction or completion of inaccurate data
Erasure of data ("right to be forgotten")
Restriction of processing and data portability
File a complaint with the Office for Personal Data Protection (www.uoou.cz)

tosPage.title: Terms of Service
tosPage.intro: These Terms of Service govern the relationship between the Pupen Student Association, z.s. (hereinafter the "Association") and users of the pupen.org website.
tosPage.membershipText: The website serves to inform about Association activities, event registration, and managing member benefits. Some parts of the site are accessible only to official Association members after logging in.
tosPage.registrationText: Registration for events via the RSVP form is binding. In the case of digital tickets, the user is obliged to present a valid QR code upon entry.
tosPage.contentText: All content on the website (texts, photos, logos) is the property of the Association or its partners. Any distribution without prior consent is prohibited.
tosPage.disclaimerText: The Association is not liable for any damages resulting from the use of the website or for the content of external links (partners, ISIC discounts).
tosPage.oauthText: The website may allow Google sign-in (OAuth). If you use it, identity verification happens with the provider (Google) and we process the necessary data to create and manage your account. Using Google sign-in is optional.

cookiesPage.title: Cookie Policy
cookiesPage.intro: Our website uses cookies to ensure the best user experience and to help us continuously improve the site.
cookiesPage.whatAreCookiesText: Cookies are small text files that a website stores in your browser. They help us remember your settings or anonymously analyze traffic.
cookiesPage.typesTitle: What types of cookies do we use?
cookiesPage.necessaryDesc: Required for the correct functioning of the website, navigation, digital scavenger hunts (game state), and security. They cannot be turned off.
cookiesPage.prefDesc: They remember your choices, such as selected language or favorite discounts.
cookiesPage.statsDesc: They help us understand how visitors use the website (e.g., which sections of the freshman guide are most read). Data is anonymized.
cookiesPage.manageText: Most browsers allow you to manage cookies in the settings. You can also delete cookies from your browser history at any time.
